title: The Rocky Horror Glee Show
overview: "The Rocky Horror Glee Show" (Season 2, Episode 5) is a 2010 Glee tribute episode where the glee club stages a school production of The Rocky Horror Show. Driven by Will Schuester’s jealousy of Emma’s new boyfriend, the episode explores themes of body image with Finn and Sam while featuring iconic songs and a cameo from original film stars Barry Bostwick and Meat Loaf
